description: Deterministic no-network E2E proof contract for proof reuse cache-hit, refusal, rerun-required, no-win, and redaction paths.

reference_reuse_query.expected_top_rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_proof_reuse_cache_contract cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_reuse_cache_contract -- --nocapture

scenarios.description: Exact focused contract lane, claim scope, command, source, toolchain, outcome, and remote provenance match; the cache hit is approved but explicitly not a fresh RCH rerun.

manifest_policy.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture

handoff.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture
handoff.operator_statement: Approved cache hit for proof-lane-manifest-verifier; this is not a fresh RCH rerun and is not workspace health.

stage_log.detail: request command, source, toolchain, env, and claim fingerprints are complete
scanned approved proof index root and found one classifier-approved candidate
classifier accepted exact remote RCH proof
manifest permits cache reuse only for proof-lane-manifest-verifier
cache hit is citeable for the narrow claim and is not a fresh RCH pass

scenarios.description: All-target frontier lane has a dirty overlap and must be rerun even when an otherwise matching cache candidate exists.

manifest_policy.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_all_targets CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo check -p asupersync --all-targets

handoff.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_all_targets CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo check -p asupersync --all-targets
handoff.operator_statement: Rerun required because the dirty frontier overlaps all-targets-check; the prior candidate is not citeable.

stage_log.detail: found candidate whose surface overlaps dirty work
manifest requires fresh rerun on dirty overlap
included dirty-frontier verdict and rerun command
frontier cache candidate is not citeable

scenarios.description: Candidate has a matching command and claim scope but records local fallback, so reuse is refused and the handoff is marker-only.

manifest_policy.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture

handoff.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture
handoff.operator_statement: Refused cache reuse because the candidate recorded local fallback; rerun remotely before citing proof.

stage_log.detail: found one matching candidate with local fallback marker
local fallback evidence cannot seed cache reuse

scenarios.description: Candidate proof returned a nonzero exit status, so the first blocker is retained and the lane must be rerun.

manifest_policy.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture

handoff.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture
handoff.operator_statement: Rerun required because the candidate proof exited nonzero; retain only the first blocker line.

stage_log.detail: nonzero proof cannot satisfy manifest lane

scenarios.description: Candidate was produced for a stale HEAD and is suppressed as stale evidence.

manifest_policy.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture

handoff.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture
handoff.first_blocker_line: candidate HEAD 5417ddb5d does not match current HEAD
handoff.operator_statement: Refused cache reuse because candidate HEAD is stale; rerun the manifest command for current evidence.

stage_log.detail: stale cache hit is outside citeable policy
included stale-head reason and rerun command

scenarios.description: Candidate proof was produced from a non-main branch and is suppressed even if all other fields look compatible.

manifest_policy.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture

handoff.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture
handoff.operator_statement: Refused cache reuse because candidate branch was not main.

stage_log.detail: non-main candidate cannot satisfy main-only policy
included branch-mismatch reason and rerun command
candidate is stale evidence from a non-main branch

scenarios.description: Toolchain, environment, or feature fingerprints differ; the candidate must not be reused for the requested manifest lane.

manifest_policy.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture

handoff.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture
handoff.first_blocker_line: candidate toolchain fingerprint did not match request
handoff.operator_statement: Rerun required because toolchain, environment, or feature fingerprints differ.

stage_log.detail: request fingerprint includes toolchain, env, and feature set
found current-clean candidate with mismatched fingerprints
strict proof reuse requires matching toolchain and feature fingerprints
included mismatch reason and rerun command
fresh rerun is required for changed fingerprints

scenarios.description: A focused lane cache hit is refused for an unsupported broad workspace-health claim.

manifest_policy.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture

handoff.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture
handoff.first_blocker_line: workspace-health is not citeable from this focused lane
handoff.operator_statement: Refused cache reuse because workspace-health is not citeable from this focused lane.

stage_log.detail: manifest does not permit broad workspace-health cache reuse
included unsupported claim reason and rerun command
cache hit cannot support the broad claim

scenarios.description: No safe cache candidate exists and RCH admission is unavailable, so the operator outcome is an explicit no-win rather than a fake pass.

rch_admission.first_blocker_line: RCH unavailable: no remote worker admitted clippy-all-targets

manifest_policy.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_clippy_all_targets CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo clippy -p asupersync --all-targets -- -D warnings

handoff.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_clippy_all_targets CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo clippy -p asupersync --all-targets -- -D warnings
handoff.first_blocker_line: RCH unavailable: no remote worker admitted clippy-all-targets
handoff.operator_statement: No-win: cache candidates are unsafe and RCH could not admit the required clippy frontier lane.

stage_log.detail: manifest requires the clippy all-targets command
no safe reuse or rerun path is available under current constraints

scenarios.description: A proof log with unsafe detail is summarized with only the first blocker line; raw logs, raw coordination bodies, and secret-like payloads are suppressed.

manifest_policy.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture

handoff.rerun_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_manifest CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_manifest_contract -- --nocapture
handoff.operator_statement: Rerun required; retained only the first blocker line and suppressed unsafe proof detail.

stage_log.detail: found failed candidate with unsafe detail

expected_markdown_summary:
# Proof reuse E2E contract v1

- scenarios: 10
- approved-cache-hit: 1
- rerun-required: 4
- refused: 4
- no-win: 1
- cache_hit_is_fresh_rch_pass: 0
- raw_payloads_included: 0

## Scenario verdicts
1. exact-focused-cache-hit | verdict=approved-cache-hit | proof=approved-cache-hit | reasons=<none>
2. frontier-dirty-overlap-rerun | verdict=rerun-required | proof=rerun-required | reasons=dirty-frontier-overlap
3. local-fallback-refused | verdict=refused | proof=rerun-required | reasons=local-fallback-marker
4. failed-nonzero-rerun | verdict=rerun-required | proof=rerun-required | reasons=failed-proof-status
5. stale-head-refused | verdict=refused | proof=stale-evidence | reasons=stale-head
6. branch-mismatch-refused | verdict=refused | proof=stale-evidence | reasons=branch-mismatch
7. toolchain-env-feature-mismatch-rerun | verdict=rerun-required | proof=rerun-required | reasons=toolchain-mismatch
8. unsupported-broad-claim-refused | verdict=refused | proof=unsupported | reasons=broad-claim-unsupported
9. rch-unavailable-no-win | verdict=no-win | proof=no-win | reasons=failed-proof-status,stale-head,rch-unavailable-no-safe-cache
10. redaction-first-blocker-only | verdict=rerun-required | proof=rerun-required | reasons=failed-proof-status,secret-like-data-redacted
